utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items required in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- destination: Provided as 'Prague, Czech Republic' — fully specified.
- travel_dates: 'July 11-15, 2024 (5 days, 4 nights)' — specific dates provided — fully specified.
- transportation: Requires flight details with costs. Provided: 'Budget Airlines Economy flights from Paris to Prague - €200'. It includes route and cost, but lacks airline name, flight numbers, and times. The format only says 'flight details with costs' without enumerating exact subfields; still, 'details' could imply more specificity. However, given typical evaluations, route + class + cost can be considered sufficient. I will count it as included.
- accommodation: 'Luxury Suites (5-star, 9.7/10 rating) - €650' — has type/rating and cost, but no exact hotel name/address or nights. The format only asks 'hotel selection with costs'; naming 'Luxury Suites' (implying a specific hotel) and cost is likely sufficient. Count as included.
- activities: 'selected activities with costs' — list with items and costs for each provided. Included.
- additional_services: 'any extra services with costs' — list with items and costs; one item marked 'Included' (no euro amount), still specifies cost as included. Included.
- total_budget: 'complete cost breakdown' — provided with a breakdown summing to €1,700. Included.
Thus, all 7 items are present and reasonably specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item from the final package to the closest exact-name item in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: 'Prague, Czech Republic' maps to 'Prague, Czech Republic'. Transportation: 'Budget Airlines Economy flights' maps to transportation > budget_airlines > Economy Class. Accommodation: 'Luxury Suites' matches accommodation > Luxury Suites. Activities: 'Golf Day access with equipment' maps to activities > Golf Day; 'City Walking Tour' maps to activities > City Walking Tour; 'Fine Dining Experience' maps to activities > Fine Dining Experience (note restaurants also has a 'Fine Dining Experience' but in the package it’s under activities/experiences). Additional services: 'Airport Taxi service' maps to additional_hotel_services > Airport Taxi. 'Service fees' and 'Strawberry allergy accommodation' do not have corresponding rating entries.

final_package_text:
{
    "destination": "Prague, Czech Republic",
    "travel_dates": "July 11-15, 2024 (5 days, 4 nights)",
    "transportation": "Budget Airlines Economy flights from Paris to Prague - €200",
    "accommodation": "Luxury Suites (5-star, 9.7/10 rating) - €650",
    "activities": [
        "Golf Day access with equipment (4 people) - €200",
        "City Walking Tour (4 people) - €80", 
        "Fine Dining Experience - Chef's tasting menu (4 people) - €280"
    ],
    "additional_services": [
        "Airport Taxi service - €80",
        "Service fees - €210",
        "Strawberry allergy accommodation - Included"
    ],
    "total_budget": "€1,700 (complete cost breakdown: Flights €200 + Accommodation €650 + Golf €200 + Walking Tour €80 + Fine Dining €280 + Airport Taxi €80 + Service Fees €210 = €1,700)"
}
